insight_text: 18.8% of customers are at churn risk. This segment is described as Dormant premium assets with Avg total spending ¥3866.1. Recommended action: Build win-back campaigns with product upgrade reminders, after-sales recovery, and service follow-up..

Male customers around age 45 peak in both customer volume and AOV. Business meaning: This group is the core profit driver of the platform. Recommended action: launch premium electronics campaigns with expert reviews and VIP services.

Rural high-value customers show strong preference and high AOV in the Books category. Business meaning: Rural market contains underexplored knowledge consumption demand. Recommended action: create curated book bundles and knowledge-oriented content campaigns.

29.2% of customers are potential customers. They are the Growth engine but currently show Large base but low repurchase frequency. Recommended action: use repurchase incentives, category bundles, and personalized recommendations to increase repeat purchases.

17.8% of customers are high-value customers. They are the Core profit engine with preference for Apparel. Recommended action: build VIP retention, loyalty benefits, and premium product recommendations.

The top 10% users contribute approximately 18.6% of total spending.. Business meaning: Revenue is concentrated among higher-value customers.. Recommended action: Prioritize retention and service resources for top-value users..
